status: R0.2 Phase 2 Stage A LM Studio config patch only. granite-4.1-30b and gemma-4-31b added by user request; no model execution has been run from this config.
_scope: RAG-aware Phase 2.2 Stage A model-axis config for EMR_AI_24clinic /explain. This is not the HP Z2 smoke config and not a heavy-run result artifact.
_canonical_workspace: Main PC keeps source-of-truth docs, commits, and pushes. HP Z2 is execution-only runner.
_hard_stops: Do not run this config unless the user explicitly issues Phase 2 heavy run GO.
Do not write to EMR_AI_24clinic from this config patch.
Do not commit or push without explicit user GO.
Do not run Stage B top_k, Stage C prompt-tone, or chunk variation without separate GO.

_backend._note: LM Studio server URL is for the LLM backend lane. The /explain app endpoint host is runner-specific and must be supplied by the heavy-run runner.

_load_profile._note: The -y CLI arg is required to avoid interactive multiple-match prompts for keys such as openai/gpt-oss-20b.

_execution_pacing._note: Future heavy-run runner should not immediately load the next model after a long load/unload. Wait for LM Studio to report no loaded models, then apply the cooldown before continuing.

_stage_policy: Stage A is model-axis only: top_k=5, min_similarity=0.45, Fix v3 prompt tone, current chunk baseline.
qwen3-14b is the primary small-dense RAG candidate.
qwen3-8b is the fallback / low-resource RAG candidate.
gpt-oss-20b is the direct RAG endpoint comparison candidate.
granite-4.1-30b and gemma-4-31b are included by user request after HP Z2 LM Studio smoke viability.
gpt-oss-120b is included by user request after HP Z2 LM Studio smoke viability; interpret results with its long load time tracked separately.
Use execution pacing between all models; especially after qwen3.6-35b-a3b, gemma-4-31b, and gpt-oss-120b.

stage_a_cells._role: secondary 30B comparison candidate added by user request
secondary dense quality/safety wording comparison candidate added by user request
large gpt-oss comparison candidate added by user request

version_log.change: Initial Phase 2 Stage A LM Studio config patch after HP Z2 smoke baseline and RA-03 user resolution. Config only: heavy run X / model execution X / EMR_AI_24clinic write X / commit X / push X.

Added openai/gpt-oss-120b as a Phase 2 Stage A RAG endpoint test target by user request. Removed it from hold_models; granite-4.1-30b and gemma-4-31b remain HOLD. Config only: heavy run X / model execution X / EMR_AI_24clinic write X / commit X / push X.

Added ibm/granite-4.1-30b and google/gemma-4-31b as Phase 2 Stage A RAG endpoint test targets by user request. hold_models is now empty. Added execution pacing policy: require unload/no-models status before next load, 90s default post-unload cooldown, 180s cooldown after large models or failures, and 10s post-load settle. Config only: heavy run X / model execution X / EMR_AI_24clinic write X / commit X / push X.

Bound Stage A config to tools/hpz2_lmstudio_phase2_stage_a_runner.py and corrected app_repo path relative to local-llm-eval repo root. Runner-side LM Studio adapter keeps EMR_AI_24clinic read-only. Patch/validation only: heavy run X / model execution X / EMR_AI_24clinic write X.
